title: Homestead GUI
description: A cozy GUI and HUD overhaul, themed around natural woods and stones.
body:
## **Homestead GUI**

A complete GUI and HUD overhaul pack, which is meant to feel more stylistic than the base game, focused around natural wood and stone.

## Mod / Server Support

This resource pack has mod support! The pack is actively designed with [Njol's HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/njols-hud) in mind, so I highly recommend using it in conjunction with this pack. 

It also has some level of updated support for [Vlado's Gross Hacks](https://github.com/Vladomeme/gross-hacks/releases), [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge). 

There is also very bad, outdated support for [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), but this will likely either be dropped or remade in the future.

This also has partial support for the Player Stats GUI on the [Monumenta Server](https://playmonumenta.com/). In the future, more GUIs on the server will be supported.

## **Important Note**

This is a beta release! This is not finished! It likely won't ever properly be finished! Very little is also actually done. As of Public Beta v0.1, it's really only the Survival GUI, HUD and half-finished support for Njol's HUD mod.

This resource pack is also built ontop of an old GUI pack I made, so there is stylistic inconsistencies, and a couple of old bugs! Who knows when they get fixed?

Additionally, there is a very good chance that *everything* that you see and experience currently will be tweaked, remade and/or redesigned completely. I'm still trying to figure out exactly how I want this pack to look, and what I want to get out of it.

__The only reason this is published here is because people have been asking me about using beta versions for months.__ This is nowhere near finished.
